item.title: eSUN PLA+ Filament 1.75mm 3D Printer Filament PLA Plus Maatnauwkeurigheid +/- 0.03mm 1kg Spoel 2.2 LBS 3D Print Filament voor 3D Printers Zwart
item.description: There’s a deal eSUN PLA+ Filament 1.75mm 3D Printer Filament PLA Plus Maatnauwkeurigheid +/- 0.03mm 1kg Spoel 2.2 LBS 3D Print Filament voor 3D Printers Zwart here: ℹ️: 【Totale Lengte: 340-350m】Volledige 3D printer filament rol van 1kg, perfecte rondheid en zeer strakke diameter tolerantie, goede wikkeling, zal niet overlappen of klitten. Smelt goed, voedt gelijkmatig en consistent zonder de nozzle of extruder te verstoppen. 【Dimensionale Tolerantie +/- 0,03mm】eSUN PLA+ 3D printer filamenten zijn vervaardigd met nauwkeurigere specificaties.

item.title: SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm Grey
item.description: There’s a deal SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm Grey here: ℹ️: 【Life-time Guarantee】24-hour professional after-sales consultation to provide you with meticulous care and best solutions. 【Super Performance】SUNLU PLA Plus filament has higher strength and stiffness, and tougher than ordinary PLA filament. 【Smooth And Delicate】PLA Plus 1.75mm has better toughness, and the printed material is very smooth, and the texture after printing is more delicate.

item.title: SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm White
item.description: You can find SUNLU PLA Plus Filament 1.75mm for 3D Printer & 3D Pens 1KG 2.2LBS PLA+ 3D Filament Tolerance Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm White with a discount here: ℹ️: 【More Details】SUNLU 3D printer filament are Vacuum packed, neatly arranged to prevent entanglement, 100% no bubbles. 【Super Performance】SUNLU PLA Plus filament has higher strength and stiffness, and tougher than ordinary PLA filament. 【Advanced Production】SUNLU 3D filament 1.75mm has the lowest tolerance value in the entire 3D printing filament industry, amazingly reached 1.
